assignments.name: script
assignments.value: Credit card ka minimum payment trap! Kya aap bhi har mahine sirf minimum amount pay karte ho? Maan lo bill hai ₹30,000 aur minimum sirf ₹1,500. Baaki ₹28,500 par high interest lagna shuru. Debt kam hone ke bajaye badhta jaata hai. Hamesha full outstanding pay karein. Minimum payment is a trap, not a solution! Finplaza ko follow karein!

nodes.name: Set script
nodes.notes: Short test line (later this comes from B1's output).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [ { parts: [ { text: 'Read this Hinglish YouTube Short script as an energetic, friendly Indian finance host. Vary your pace for impact: say rupee amounts and key numbers SLOWLY and clearly, deliver short punchy lines FAST and lively, and pause a beat before the big reveal. Script: ' + $json.script } ] } ], generationConfig: { responseModalities: ["AUDIO"], speechConfig: { voiceConfig: { prebuiltVoiceConfig: { voiceName: $json.voice } } } } }) }}

nodes.name: Gemini — TTS
nodes.notes: Free TTS via your Gemini key. voiceName options: Kore, Puck, Charon, Aoede, Fenrir... change to taste.
